$readme: This is the TEMPLATE, not a live profile. Every value below is a placeholder — never a real name, institution, account, or budget.
Your live profile belongs OUTSIDE this repo at ~/.claude/plugins/data/workbench-ynab-claude-workbench/tax-profile.json so it survives plugin updates and is never committed (this repo is PUBLIC).

To create it: mkdir -p ~/.claude/plugins/data/workbench-ynab-claude-workbench && cp assets/tax/tax-profile.example.json ~/.claude/plugins/data/workbench-ynab-claude-workbench/tax-profile.json — then replace these placeholders with your real numbers.
Do NOT put your YNAB Personal Access Token here. It lives in the macOS Keychain (service ynab-mcp) only; the launcher injects it. Tax config and the token are never co-located.
This $readme key is a $-prefixed annotation: the profile loader strips it before merging, so it never reaches any tax calculation.

scheduleLineMap.note: Detailed shape is owned by the mapping engine (issue #23); placeholder content only. categoryGroups / accounts declare this entity's business YNAB structure so the engine can route those transactions to Schedule C — use placeholder names here, never real ones.

mappingRules.reason: Payee '{payee}' is my bookkeeper; classifying as Schedule C legal and professional services.
Disable the bundled charitable rule by overlaying its id with enabled:false.
